title: SnowMeltPlugin
body:
[![Modrinth](https://github.com/modrinth/art/blob/main/Branding/Badge/badge-dark__184x72.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/snowmeltplugin)
[![Spigot Link](https://github.com/devoxx4kids/materials/blob/master/workshops/minecraft/images/spigot-logo.png?raw=true)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/snowmeltplugin.113751/)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
**SnowMeltPlugin** - is a convenient and efficient plugin for Minecraft designed to automatically remove snow and ice within a specified radius around the player or a designated point. With this plugin, players can easily maintain the cleanliness of their structures and territories, freeing them from unwanted snow coverings.

>**Automatic Snow and Ice Removal**: The plugin instantly detects and removes snow and ice blocks within the defined radius, preventing the accumulation of a white layer on surfaces.

>Flexible Radius Configuration: Admins can easily configure the plugin's action radius in the configuration file to match the specifics of their server. An adjustable radius of up to 100 blocks provides ample flexibility for various needs.

>**Performance Optimization**: The plugin is developed with performance optimization in mind, minimizing its impact on the server and ensuring smooth and stable snow and ice removal.
Control Commands: Admins with specific permissions can use commands to enable or disable the plugin's functionality and adjust the radius in real-time.

>Compatibility with Other Plugins: SnowMeltPlugin is designed to be compatible with other plugins, ensuring seamless integration into existing server setups.
